items.meaning: The day of the week used in panchangam reading.
A lunar phase division used for vratham and ritual planning.
The lunar mansion used in temple, family and astrological traditions.
One of the five limbs of panchangam.
Half of a tithi; part of panchangam calculation.
Traditionally avoided for starting major auspicious work.
items.note: Calculated from sunrise to sunset division.
